data.value: '(' expected at start of if statement
'goto' argument must be enclosed in parentheses
Complex variable math statements are not allowed
Undefined token '%3' for argument %1: expected %2
';' expected at end of statement
'{' not allowed unless following 'if' or 'else'
'}' expected
'}' not at end of any command blocks
'}' required before 'else'
'%1' is already defined in this logic
'%1' is a compiler reserved word, and cannot be redefined
'%1' is an AGI action command, and cannot be redefined
'%1' is an AGI test command and cannot be redefined
'%1' is %2, and cannot be used as a label
Duplicate label name '%1'
'==' is a comparison operator and cannot be used for variable, flag or string assignment
AND operator (&&) not allowed within brackets
AND operator (&&) or end of if statement expected
Invalid symbol '%1' in if statement
Local define argument value out of range
Unexpected symbol (%1) or syntax error in assignment statement
Brackets too deep in 'if' statement
Incorrect type or syntax error in unary (++/--) statement
Comma expected after argument %1 in %2 command
'(' expected before command arguments
Could not find include file '%1'
Block quotes (/* ... */) are not supported in WinAGI
'{' must follow an 'if' or 'else' statement
Missing argument %1 in %2 command: (expected: %3)
Error accessing include file '%1'
Expected test command, but found closing bracket
Syntax error in string assignment
Include filename missing or invalid
Invalid preprocessor symbol '%1'
Incorrect type for argument %1: '%3' is not a %2
'%1' is not a valid inventory item
Invalid value for argument %1 (must be between 0-255)
Syntax error at argument %1: expected %2
Incorrect type for argument %1: expected a %2
Non-integer numbers are not allowed
Invalid define statement - define name cannot be blank
Invalid define statement - define name cannot be argument marker
Invalid define statement - define name cannot be numeric
Invalid define statement - define value cannot be blank
Invalid message number in message declaration (must be 1 - 255)
Invalid operator in 'if' statement
Invalid string value
Invalid use of 'else'
Unexpected end of input
Invalid variable operator
Variable or number value expected; '%1' is not a variable or number
Maximum number of messages exceeded (limit is 255 per logic)
Message %1 is already assigned
Invalid negative argument value
Missing label definition
NOT operator can only be placed directly in front of a command
Nothing allowed on line after preprocessor declaration
OR operator must be within brackets
OR operator or closing bracket expected
Preprocessor commands do not use ';' as ending character
Invalid assignment operator in indirect assignment
Unknown action command '%1'
Invalid define value '%1'
'%1' is not a valid comparison operator
Logic source code is empty
')' expected after command arguments
Invalid variable or number value '%1' in arithmetic statement
Invalid word argument '%1' - must be integer value (0-65535)
Incorrect syntax for indirection assignment
This command block contains no commands
Ambiguous inventory item for argument %1
'?' is the AGI default marker for an undefined inventory item
Undefined inventory item for argument %1
Object number exceeds MaxScreenObject value (%1)
String argument value is not within expected range (0 - %1)
Word argument value is not within expected range (1 - 10)
Low values for script size will most likely cause a trappable error
Using call command on logic 0 can cause game to crash
Using clear.line command with bottom < top and/or either value > 24 will have unpredictable results
Using room 0 in the new.room command will crash AGI
Attempting to load a logic that does not exist will cause AGI to crash
Attempting to load a sound that does not exist will cause AGI to crash
Attempting to load a view that does not exist will cause AGI to crash
'%1' (%2) is normally a read-only variable; changing it could have unexpected results
'%1' shouldn't be assigned a value > %2, or unexpected results will occur
Undefined word group number(%1) in said command
One or more block coordinates are off screen (X > 159 and/or Y > 167)
Unable to validate add.to.pic arguments because view %1 cannot be loaded; check your code and your view for errors
Object position is off screen (X > 159 and/or Y > 167)
Attempting to discard a view that does not exist will cause a trappable error
'%1' (%2) is normally a read-only flag; changing it could have unexpected results
Ego direction cannot be set using the set.dir command
Using follow.ego command on ego has no effect
Using color values > 15 may have unpredictable results
Dividing by zero will cause AGI to crash
'%1' is already defined as a global name
'%1' is already defined as a reserved name
'%1' is already defined by '%2'
'%1' is overriding a global define
'%1' is overriding a reserved define
Variable is being assigned to itself
Attempting to set a view that does not exist will cause a trappable error
Position is off screen (X > 159 and/or Y > 167
Using script.size command outside logic 0 wastes memory
Referencing a logic that does not exist will crash AGI
Setting the horizon less than 16 is unusual
Setting the horizon greater than 120 is unusual
Setting the horizon greater than 167 may cause unexpected results
TOP argument is too large; portions of the play area will be off-screen, and graphics functions will be unpredictable
Using move.obj on ego automatically forces program control mode
If HEIGHT is less than 2, AGI resets it to 2 automatically
Using submit.menu command outside logic 0 wastes memory
INPUTLINE and STATUSLINE are the same, which is usually not desired
INPUTLINE and/or STATUSLINE are inside the graphic display; this is usually not desired
Setting PRIORITY to < 4 or > 15 may cause unexpected results
X2 - X1 should be >= 2 and Y2 - Y1 should be >= 2; this block will not behave as expected
If ROW >= 25 the prompt string is drawn at current text cursor location (both ROW and COL arguments are ignored)
Using new.room command on a non-existent room will crash AGI
Using random command with lower bound > upper bound will have unexpected results
Assigning a large number to 'cycle_delay' (v10) is highly unusual
LENGTH is > max string length
Large values for shake.screen command are unusual
This 'shake.screen' command appears to be an AGIPAL palette change; don't use original interpreter to run this game
Cursor position is off screen (ROW > 24 and/or COL > 39)
Controller argument value is not within expected range (0 - 49)
Using show.obj command with an invalid view will generate a trappable error
Target position is off screen (X > 159 and/or Y > 167)
The ROW and HEIGHT combination specified will not fit on the screen
Using add.to.pic command with an invalid view will generate a trappable error
set.key parameters are not a valid ASCII code or KEY code
Assigning keycode values that correspond to normal input keys may result in unpredictable behavior in AGI
The message box won't draw correctly if ROW > 22
The message box may not draw correctly if COL < 2 or (COL + MAXWIDTH) > 39
Invalid cursor position for clear.text.rect command; must be in upper-left/lower-right format
Invalid cursor position values for clear.text.rect command; R1 & R2 must be <=24; C1 & C2 must be <=39
Using a value > 167 for set.pri.base results in entire screen being priority 4
One or more test command coordinates are offscreen (X > 159 and/or Y > 167)
X1 should be <= X2 and Y1 should be <= Y2; this test command will not behave as expected
Message is null (0 length)
'%1' is not a supported command for this game's interpreter version
Attempting to call a logic that does not exist will cause AGI to crash
Using a reserved variable in '%1' command may cause unexpected behavior
Using a reserved flag in '%1' command may cause unexpected behavior
Setting PRIORITY to 1, 2 or 3, or > 15 in add.to.pic command may cause unexpected results
Setting COL to > 39 in the get.string command will cause the PROMPT to appear in unexpected location
Test command 'return.false()' is not compatible with AGIStudio
'object.on.land', 'object.on.water' and 'object.on.anything' have no effect on ego object
'%1' is a Group 0 word, which is always ignored by AGI, so it will never be detected by the 'said' command
Attempting to play a sound that does not exist will cause a trappable error
Using add.to.pic command with an invalid loop will generate a trappable error
Using add.to.pic command with an invalid cel will generate a trappable error
%1 command has no functionality in MSDOS AGI interpreter
%1 command is incompatible with MSDOS AGI interpreter
Recursively calling a logic can crash AGI
Undefined message (m%1); null value assumed
Using m0 as a message value will cause an error
Unless resetting after responding to an error, '%1' should normally be treated as read-only
Using control characters 8 or 13 in message text will result in incorrectly displayed messages
Messages with extended characters (128-255) won't display correctly in most circumstances
Commands after a new.room() or new.room.v() command are always ignored by AGI
Using a long input prompt is unusual and will limit player input
Commands after a return command are always ignored by AGI
Negative numbers are converted to unsigned 2s complement value
INPUTLINE and/or STATUSLINE > 24 will result in undesirable effects on graphics screen
COLOR value other than 0 is treated as 15
MGN values > 15 will cause unexepected results in add.to.pic command
Object will never catch ego if DISTANCE <= 1
Using a value of 1 for MAXWIDTH will crash AGI
Print window will not display correctly if MAXWIDTH > 36
Print window will use default value of 30 if MAXWIDTH = 0
When UPPER = LOWER, result will always be the same
If LOWER = UPPER + 1, AGI will crash due to 'Divide by 0' error
The word '%1' is not in WORDS.TOK, but AGI automatically assigns it to group 0
Or brackets unnecessary for a single test command
Include file stack overflow; limit is five
Error %1 occurred while trying to access %2.
Error %1 occurred while setting game ID
'%1' is not a valid AGI game directory.
'%1' is not a valid directory file.
No source code to compile.
Maximum number of cels exceeded in loop %1.
Unhandled error %1 while expanding resource.
Error in CompileSound method(%1)
Can't add item; maximum number of objects already in OBJECT file
Can't add word; it already exists
Can't add word; invalid group number
Can't delete wordgroup; it does not exist
Can't delete word; it does not exist
Maximum number of VOL files exceeded - GAME IS TOO BIG!!!
Can't export file; unable to load resource data
Can't create new resource; index already in use
No data to import
Can't delete last cel in a loop
Can't delete last loop in a view
Invalid data format for cel data
Only logics in a game can be compiled
Media player error: %1
directory '%1' has no wag files
File access error in VOL file
Missing game property file (%1)
Invalid game property file version (%1)
Can't renumber; new number is already in use
Invalid sound script file
Unable to copy template files to game directory due to error: %1
Unable to open the newly created game due to error: %1
Can't create new game in a directory that already has a wag file
Can't create new game in a directory that already has AGI game files
Game property file does not contain a valid GameID.
%1 is not a valid AGI interpreter version.
Game property file '%1' is read only
File access error when reading game property file - %1: %2
Invalid sound playback format
'OR' block has no test commands
'if' block has no test commands
Cel width less than 3 will not draw control box correctly
Commands after a forced quit() command are always ignored by AGI
Duplicate include file (%1)
Include file cannot be this logic's source code file
%1 is a required #include file for this logic
Invalid string value, unable to concatenate
Define '%1' redefines %2 '%3'
Invalid flag assignment, value must be 'true' or 'false'
Using zero as shake.screen argument will cause eight hours of shaking
'%1' is a test command and is only valid inside an 'if' block
'%1' is an argument marker, can only be used as an argument to a valid AGI action or test command
%1 detected when command expected
Invalid use of 'NOT' operator
A valid test command must follow a NOT operator
Undefined word '%1' in said command
'{' encountered when expecting action command
Include files must be enclosed in double quotes
A label marker (:) is expected after a label name
String value expected in message declaration
Indirection marker is only valid when using alternate syntax assignment
Syntax error in indirection assignment
Indirection marker is only valid with variables
Menu "%1" has no items assigned to it
Menu "%1" has too many items
submit.menu called before any menus added
More than one submit.menu() command is unnecessary
set.menu and set.menu.item commands are ignored after submit.menu is called
Menu item "%1" text width exceeds menu display width
Defines '%1' and '%2' make a circular reference
Source code must end with a return command

data.value: %3 command %1 not defined (%2)

data.name: DW13
data.value: Screen object value is greater than game's MaxScreenObj (%1)

data.name: DW14
data.value: String number is greater than maximum allowed value for the target game version (%1)

data.name: DW15
data.value: Controller number is greater than maximum usable value for the target game version (%1)

data.value: Word argument number is greater than maximum usable value (10)

data.value: Unexpected end of input

data.value: Valid reference to WORDS.TOK is missing

data.value: Message %1 is not referenced in logic source code

data.name: RE27
data.value: Unable to import resource for %1 %2 from Sierra source files (%3)
A critical game file (%1) is missing.
UNHANDLED ERROR %1: %2\n\n" + %3
Invalid data in game property file.
Property or method not available until object is loaded.
WORDS.TOK filename %1
WORDS.TOK filename must be enclosed in quotes
WORDS.TOK has already been loaded
'%1' is already defined; duplicate define names are not allowed
Argument lists must be enclosed in parentheses
Invalid argument type or syntax error in %1 preprocessor statement
Action command %1 (%2) not supported in the AGI version for this game
Number expected in %1 preprocessor statement,'%2' is not a number
Invalid command number in %1 command preprocessor statement
Invalid argument list in 'said' command preprocessor statement
Invalid argument type in %1 command preprocessor statement
Argument list mismatch in %1 command preprocessor statement
Invalid name in %1 preprocessor statement
Message text is too long
Invalid define value '%1'
Numerical values outside byte range will be converted to a byte value
Reserved %1 is normally read-only; changing it could have unexpected results
View %1 does not exist; accessing it in code will cause an error
Using message number of zero will corrupt the compiled logic
'%1' command not defined
Invalid action command '%1'
Fan syntax assignment statement not supported in Sierra syntax
Right indirection only valid with variable arguments
More than ten words in said command are ignored
Consecutive NOT operators (!) will toggle the NOT status
WORDS.TOK file not loaded with %tokens preprocessor
Numbers are not valid arguments for the said command
said command arguments must not be enclosed in quotes
Undefined message (%1)
'%1' already included
Non-numeric characters in this token will be ignored (%1)
Using '!=' when a test is already negated will toggle the NOT status
return command not needed at end of logic source
'%1' is an object being used as a number
Maximum number of label entries exceeded
Null label name is allowed, but unusable
'%1' is a key word or default compiler define name
Too many 'goto' statements
Using '&' or '|' in tokens other than "&&" or "||" will crash Sierra's compiler
'%1' token found when expecting a command; the token will be ignored
said command word arguments will automatically be converted to lower case
Character '\x1a' forces end of file; no text after this character will be processed
Character '\x1a' gets changed to '\ff' when added to literal string
Character '\x1a' treated as a token separator when token length > 0
Too many levels of nested code blocks
Unexpected 'else' keyword will be treated as 'goto'
'%1' cannot be used as a label
'%1' is already in use as a define name and cannot be used as a label
Label '%1' not found
Using ',' as a line terminator is allowed but not preferred
Using ';' as an argument separator is allowed, but not preferred
'if' block must have at least one test command

data.name: DW21
data.value: Consecutive 'NOT' operators detected at resource index %1
'OR' block must have at least one test command

data.name: DW22
data.value: No test commands in 'if' or 'OR' block at resource index %1
Unsupported WinAGI version in template
Invalid WinAGI version in template
One or more characters are not supported in this code page

data.name: DW23
data.value: WORDS.TOK file not found; group number used as placeholder
Tokens beginning with '@', '&' or '|' are considered symbols, not identifiers
Incorrect token type '%1' in 'if' statement
Action command '%1' not valid in 'if' statement
Undefined token '%1' in 'if' statement

data.name: RW09
data.value: Plot and PlotStyle draw commands are not valid in versions 2.089 and 2.272

data.name: RW10
data.value: PlotStyle draw command is ignored in version 2.411
'rol' (word group 9999) is not recognized as a special word group in version 2.089

data.name: RW20
data.value: View %1 uses an unsupported loop mirroring format
